headline: Software Engineer @ Huawei | CS Student @ University of Warsaw
about:
My passion for algorithm design began with competitive programming in high school. This drive led me to become a multi-year Laureate and Finalist in the Polish National Olympiad in Informatics and a Finalist in the Polish Olympiad in Artificial Intelligence.

I'm currently building on this foundation as a Computer Science student at the University of Warsaw, where I maintain a 4.85 GPA (Top 5%).
